name: Reverse Isekai
description:
I've seen all of these Isekai bots out there. But I grew tired of them. So I decided to shift the premise a little and instead have the hero (you) be reincarnated into our boring world.

And you were lucky enough to have a good soul to save you while you were unconscious.

Ignore, just keywords: hero user. Isekai.
creator: WhenTheFunni
